description: Replace legacy `tickets.create` assignment inputs with canonical top-level `assignment` schema
Replace legacy `tickets.assign.assignee` input with canonical top-level `assignment` schema
Implement a shared workflow ticket assignment resolver for user, team, and queue primary assignment
Implement shared workflow ticket resource reconciliation with replace semantics for `additional_user_ids`
Enforce create/update/assign validation rules for active internal users, valid team leads, and primary-vs-additional de-duplication
Use union semantics for team/queue assignment plus explicit `additional_user_ids` in `tickets.assign`
Preserve workflow picker metadata when nullable `anyOf` schemas are resolved in the workflow designer field extraction path
Render `assignment.primary.id` as a dependency-aware picker in the workflow editor
Render `assignment.additional_user_ids` as a multi-user picker in the workflow editor fixed-value editor
Update workflow picker metadata tests to assert the canonical nested assignment model and removal of legacy fields
Update workflow designer mapping tests to cover nested primary assignment picker and multi-user additional assignment picker rendering
